titleStmt.title: SII 23.99: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 99. (A.R. No. 99 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the same wall Jat. Kulaśēkhara: year 13+12: 1214-15 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with introduction Pūviṉ kiḻatti, etc. It registers a gift of 14 achchu made by one Āchchāṉ Tiruvikkiramaṉ of Mayilaikkāḍu in Malai-maṇḍalam, for the expenses of offerings during the two services in the temple morning and evening, to the image of Kshētrapāla named Nilaiyaḻagiya-Perumāḷ consecrated by Kākkunāyakaṉ Śrīvallavaṉ alias Uttama-Pāṇḍya-Brahmādirājaṉ of Tirunaṟaiyūr. The amount was left in charge of the Śivabrāhmaṇas who undertook to measure out as interest thereon, 4 nāḻi of paddy every day before the supervising Māhēśvaras. Most of these Śivabrāhmaṇas figure in No. 100 also below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūviṉ kiḻatti mevi viṟṟiruppa metiṉi
mātu nitiyiṟ puṇara vayappor
maṭantai jayappuyattiruppa nāviṉ maṭantai
vākkiṉil viḷaṅkat ticaiyirunāṉkumicai nilā
veṟippa maṟaineṟivaḷara maṉuneṟi tikaḻa Aṟane
ṟiccamaiyaṅka ḷāṟun taḻaippak kāṉaveṅkai
yai villuṭaṉ turantu miṉaṅ kaṉakācaṉattu
viṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri cūḻnta veḻkaṭal leḻupo
ḻil veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ ceṅkol naṭap
pa koṭuṅkali naṭuṅki neṭumpilatto
ḷippa villavar cempiyar virāṭar varāṭar
pallavar tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟaimuṟai paṇiya Irune
miyaḷavu moru nemi yoṅka viṉṉamutākiya viya
licai nāṭaka maṉṉivaḷara maṇimuṭi cūṭi veṟpe
ṉa voṅkiya virasiṁhāsaṉattuk kaṟpakaniḻaṟ
kiṭ kalaivallor pukaḻa maṉṉavar teviyar va
ṇaṅki niṉṟetta Aṉṉameṉṉaṭai yavaṉi muḻutuṭai
yāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī koccaṭaiyapaṉ
marāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kulacekarate
vaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3- vatiṉ Etir 10 2- m muḷḷināṭ
ṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājarājacaturvedimaṅkalat
tu teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicciyil Uṭai
yār nālāyira viśvaramuṭaiyār koyil śi
vabrāhmaṇarom Ikkoyilil tirunaṟaiyūṟ kā
kkunāyakaṉ śrīvallavaṉāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiya
brahmātirājaṉ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta kṣetrapālar tirunilai
yaḻakiya piḷḷaiyārkku malaimaṇṭalattu mayilaik
kāṭṭu Āccāṉ tiruvikkiramaṉ Amutupaṭikku Aip
pacimāsamutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku Arici nāṉāḻiyākac cantirātittavaṟ celuttuvatāka Ivaṉpakkal nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa Accu 10 6 Ivvaccu patiṉāṟukkum poliyūṭṭā
kac celuttuvomākavum kaṟiyamutu Uppamutum miḷakamutun neyyamutun tayiramutum Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutum ciṟukālaiccantikkum Iravaic cantikkum celuttuvomākavum Ivvarici nāṉāḻiyā
l Irunāḻi ciṟukālaiccantikkum Irunāḻi Iravaiccantikkum cantirā tittavaṟ celuttuvomākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭaṅ koṭu koyil pukuvāṉ celuttuvomākavum Innimantam cimākecu
varak kaṇkāṇiyoṭuṅ kūṭa Inta Arici Aḷappomākavum kāśipakotti rattu caṭṭaṉ māṉatiśurammuṭaiyāṉāṉa virāparaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ikkottirattu caṭṭaṉ perumāṉāṉa kirāmarācapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu kā civakottirattu Umaiyāḷvāṉ Āviṉkaṉṟaṉāṉa niyāyaparipāla paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
kaviciyakottirattu poṉṉampi veḷḷantāṅkiṉāṉ Āṉa tirucciṟṟam palapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu poṉṉampi Umaiyāḻvāṉāṉa Āyirattaḷipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai poṉṉampi cikaiyilāyamuṭaiyāḷ Eḻuttu
kāśipakottirattu Eccavarākaṉa Āṇṭamālāṉa kotukulapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Eccavarākaṉ Āviṉkaṉṟāṉa paṉmāyecuvarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Eccavarākaṉ mahādevabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
